title: Le Havre, Normandy — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Le Havre, Normandy: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Le Havre is a city in Normandy with a population of 170,000. A UNESCO-listed post-war modernist port city rebuilt by Auguste Perret, with a striking cultural scene and maritime heritage.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
